prerequisites.label: Skill 05 - GHL Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 05 (GHL Setup) first. It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 05 on its own.

prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Private Integration Token (PIT)
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY=<your PIT> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY "$GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY". Get the PIT from GHL Settings > Integrations > Private Integrations.

prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Location ID
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID=<your location id> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env, then: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID "$GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID".
